visual_summary: A colorful, gradient-effect card component. Typically used for highlighting important information or adding visual flair to an application.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: Neon Gradient Card Demo
Description: A colorful, gradient-effect card component. Typically used for highlighting important information or adding visual flair to an application.
Style: colorful, gradient-effect
Interactions: none
Tags: card, gradient

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { NeonGradientCard } from "@/registry/magicui/neon-gradient-card"

export default function NeonGradientCardDemo() {
